productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Black White Track Pant
description: CompositionFull length black track pants made of 100% polyester, with mesh lining, adidas Essentials three stripes running down the length of legs, drawstrings and zipper at leg bottom to adjust length while exercising, welt pockets, drawcord elastic waist and embroidered logo on the left FittingComfortWash careWash using water less than 30degree C heatDo not soakDo not tumble dryDo not bleachDry in shadeFlat dryCool ironThese adidas track pants are designed to add comfort and style while you focus on your performance. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs,  these track pants keep you comfortably cool. The drawstrings at the bottom along with the zipper allow you to adjust the pant length customising your comfort, while the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly. The white strips on the sides provide free and flexible movement, and the drawstrings on the inside help you customise the Fit. Fill the deep side pockets with your essentials, including an iPod, when you're on the move. Pair it with a ClimaCool t-shirt from adidas and achieve maximum performance.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
